scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly implements the requires side of the ingress library. It uses v2 (while the gold standard references v1 as recommended but also describes v2 schema), and accurately shows IngressPerAppRequirer, the relevant events, and how to retrieve the URL. All key concepts are correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, strip_prefix, and self.ingress.url are all real APIs in the traefik-k8s ingress library. IngressPerUnitRequirer also exists. No fabricated items detected.
